nodes.name: Cron · Daily 7am MDT
nodes.notes: Wakes the agent up daily at 7am Boulder/Denver (13:00 UTC during MDT). Adjust UTC values for your timezone — PT=14, ET=11, UK=06, CET=05.

nodes.name: Manual · Webhook
nodes.notes: Manual trigger for testing and live demos. Hit the webhook URL to fire the agent on demand.

nodes.name: Read ICP from Sheets
nodes.notes: CONFIG: ICP tab columns are icp_description, signal_keywords, subreddits (comma-separated). Edit the Sheet to change agent behavior — no redeploy needed.

nodes.name: Read voice.md from Drive
nodes.notes: Pulls the voice.md tone-of-voice file. NOT connected downstream — it's executed by the trigger and read cross-node by Build Draft Body via $('Read voice.md from Drive').

nodes.name: Build Discovery Body
nodes.notes: Constructs the Anthropic /v1/messages body using the ICP fields read from the Sheet. JS template literals handle all string escaping safely.

nodes.name: Discovery · Claude Haiku 4.5 + web_search
nodes.notes: Sub-agent #1 — Haiku 4.5 with built-in web_search tool. Single call does both search AND structured extraction. Returns typed JSON.

nodes.name: Parse · Extract qualified leads
nodes.notes: Parses Claude's response, extracts the JSON array, filters to score >= 6.

nodes.name: Read Sent log
nodes.notes: Idempotency: read the Sent log so we can dedup against already-contacted people.

nodes.name: Dedup · top 5 fresh leads
nodes.notes: Idempotency primitive. Filters out already-contacted leads. Keeps top 5 by score for the expensive enrichment step.

nodes.name: Firecrawl · enrich top 5
nodes.notes: Progressive enrichment — only the top 5 leads get a Firecrawl scrape. Apache 2.0 OSS — self-host or Cloud.

nodes.name: Build Summarize Body
nodes.notes: Constructs the Anthropic /v1/messages body using the Firecrawl markdown.

nodes.name: Summarize · Haiku 4.5
nodes.notes: Cheap classifier extracts a 2-sentence company context. Cascade pattern — Haiku for summary, Sonnet for drafting.

nodes.name: Build Draft Body
nodes.notes: Constructs the Sonnet /v1/messages body. Pulls voice.md cross-node from Read voice (which is fired by the trigger but not piped here).

nodes.name: Draft · Sonnet 4.6 + voice.md
nodes.notes: Sub-agent #2 — Sonnet 4.6 drafts the personalized email using voice.md as cached context. The only premium-token step in the workflow.

nodes.name: Gmail · createDraft (HITL gate)
nodes.notes: HITL GATE — the agent NEVER sends. Drops a draft in your Drafts folder. You approve and send manually.

nodes.name: Append · Sent log
nodes.notes: Logs the draft to the Sent sheet with status=pending_review.

nodes.name: Digest · Sonnet 4.6
nodes.notes: Sub-agent #3 — generates the morning digest summary.

nodes.name: Gmail · Send digest to founder
nodes.notes: Sends the digest email to YOU. The only place the agent actually sends — and it's only sending to you, not to prospects.

nodes.name: Append · Runs audit log
nodes.notes: Audit log — every run appends a row.
